items.definition_en: The penalty area is the box in front of the goal where the goalkeeper can use their hands.
items.example_en: The foul occurred inside the penalty area.

items.definition_en: A linesman is an official who helps the referee by watching the lines during a game.
items.example_en: The linesman raised his flag for offside.

items.definition_en: A winger is a player who plays on the wings of the field.
items.example_en: The winger scored a goal with a beautiful shot.

items.definition_en: A throw-in is a way of restarting play from the side of the field.
Injury time is the extra time added at the end of a match to make up for stoppages.
items.example_en: The team scored an equalizer during injury time.

items.definition_en: A curled shot is a shot that is curved or spun in the air.
items.example_en: He scored a goal with a beautiful curled shot into the top corner.

items.definition_en: A backheel is a type of pass or shot using the heel of the foot.
items.example_en: He scored a goal with a clever backheel.

items.definition_en: A playmaker is a player who creates attacks and organizes the team's play.
items.example_en: The playmaker set up almost every goal.

items.definition_en: Promotion is when a team moves up to a higher league after a good season.
items.example_en: The team earned promotion after a series of wins.

items.definition_en: Relegation is when a team moves down to a lower division.
items.example_en: They faced relegation after losing several games.

items.definition_en: A kit is the uniform or clothing that players wear during a match.
items.example_en: The new kit was unveiled before the season began.

items.definition_en: A goal kick is a way of restarting play from the side of the field.
items.example_en: He took a powerful goal kick.

items.definition_en: A hat trick is when a player scores three goals in one game.
items.example_en: She achieved a hat trick in the final.

items.definition_en: An assist is a pass or action that directly leads to a goal.
items.example_en: He was credited with an assist for the first goal.

items.definition_en: A goalpost is a tall vertical pole on the side of the goal.
items.example_en: The ball hit the goalpost and bounced off.
